summary: Phase 73 testing completed - Checkbox and Radio field centering fix verified in all 4 PDF engines via comprehensive code review and unit tests. 20/21 Phase 73 tests passed, 11/11 docflow field tests passed, 14/16 Phase 58 tests passed (1 skip, 1 expected failure due to Phase 62 update).
critical_code_review_comments: Phase 73 Checkbox Centering VERIFIED in all 4 PDF engines:
Phase 73 Radio Centering VERIFIED in all 4 PDF engines:
- OLD left-aligned: x + 2 * scale (checkbox at left edge of field)
- NEW centered: x + (width - box_size) / 2 (checkbox centered in field)
- Example: x=100, width=200, box_size=14 → old=102, new=193 (91 points shift)

success_rate.backend: 95% (45/47 tests passed across Phase 73, Phase 58, and docflow fields)
success_rate.frontend: N/A - backend only testing as requested

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 73 centering fix verified via code review and unit tests. All 4 PDF engines (frontend pdf-lib, backend PyMuPDF for packages, backend PyMuPDF for public-link, backend ReportLab) now use centered positioning for checkbox and radio fields. The centering formula is: checkbox bx = x + (w - box_size) / 2, radio cx = x + w / 2. This matches the signing view's CSS justify-center. The Phase 58 test_05 failure is expected - it checks for hideLabelOnFinal which was removed in Phase 62 (DocuSign-style: labels NEVER drawn in final PDF).

test_results_summary.phase_73_centering_tests: 20/21 passed (1 minor regression test failure - validation API endpoint path)
test_results_summary.phase_58_pdf_overlay_tests: 14/16 passed (1 skip, 1 expected failure due to Phase 62 update)
